2327170.name: K.I.A Demo
2327170.description:
Mission Types:
  • Sabotage enemy plans
  • Steal equipment
  • Execute targets
  • Execute heists
  • Steal transport

Mechanics:
  • Emphasis on stealth
  • Special gear provided by K.I.A
  • Neck stabbing

Story Mode:
  • Engaging narrative
  • Unlocks challenges for maps

Challenge Mode:
  • Difficult and time-bound
  • Unlocks as you play the story

Note From the Developer:
This game is made by one person, I am a big fan of old school hard stealth games where they are hard at first but then you start doing speed runs.

That's What This Game Is About.
2327170.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
